buckets.description: Questions that require identifying the parts of the respiratory and circulatory systems and describing their primary roles.
Questions focusing on the process of gas exchange in the lungs and the differences in composition between inhaled and exhaled air.
Questions about the pathway of blood flow and the transport of oxygen, carbon dioxide, and nutrients to and from different body parts.
Questions analyzing how and why breathing rate, heart rate, and blood flow change in response to physical activities like exercise.
